description: Scenario pack for the Milestone 31 deck-roguelike game class demo fixture. The seeded run is driven through the read-only runtime probe; the live seed-reproducibility proof is in demo-smoke.test.cjs.

scenarioGroups.description: Bounded source and evidence contracts for the seed-reproducible deck-roguelike run.

scenarios.description: The seeded demo run (seed 12345) is digest-stable, reaches a win, and exposes deck/hand/enemy world-state through the read-only probe; no production-readiness, quality, or Godot-parity claim.
